'''fawozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivesheadiomorph|ivesheadiomorph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivesheadiomorph|ivesheadiomorph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fawozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæwezheth|fæwezheth]] || [[word:fæwezhej|fæwezhej]] || [[word:fæwezhesh|fæwezhesh]] || [[word:fæwezhe|fæwezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fawowozhoth|fawowozhoth]] || [[word:fawowozhoj|fawowozhoj]] || [[word:fawowozhosh|fawowozhosh]] || [[word:fawowozho|fawowozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fawozhoth|fawozhoth]] || [[word:fawozhoj|fawozhoj]] || [[word:fawozhosh|fawozhosh]] || [[word:fawozho|fawozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fawofzhoth|fawofzhoth]] || [[word:fawofzhoj|fawofzhoj]] || [[word:fawofzhosh|fawofzhosh]] || [[word:fawofzhof|fawofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fawozhotho|fawozhotho]] || [[word:fawozhojo|fawozhojo]] || [[word:fawozhosho|fawozhosho]] || [[word:fawozhoko|fawozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fawozhoth|fawozhoth]] || [[word:fawozhoj|fawozhoj]] || [[word:fawozhosh|fawozhosh]] || [[word:fawozho|fawozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fawozhothol|fawozhothol]] || [[word:fawozhojol|fawozhojol]] || [[word:fawozhoshol|fawozhoshol]] || [[word:fawozhokol|fawozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fawozhothotho|fawozhothotho]] || [[word:fawozhojojo|fawozhojojo]] || [[word:fawozhoshosho|fawozhoshosho]] || [[word:fawozhoko|fawozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fawozhothon|fawozhothon]] || [[word:fawozhojon|fawozhojon]] || [[word:fawozhoshon|fawozhoshon]] || [[word:fawozhokon|fawozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fawozhothoro|fawozhothoro]] || [[word:fawozhojoro|fawozhojoro]] || [[word:fawozhoshoro|fawozhoshoro]] || [[word:fawozhokoro|fawozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
